items.title: Trump tariffs 'imposition' on Americans, says US chief justice. Why raising revenue 'domestically' may make them illegal
items.description: Trump's tariffs are bringing in record revenue and he's promised $2K checks to Americans, but they may not survive the Supreme Court.

items.title: Home Is Where The Pain Is
items.description: It's been a painful year for homebuilders. The iShares Home Construction ETF (ITB) remains stuck in a steep short-term downtrend, below its 200-DMA and much closer to 52-week lows than highs

items.title: Wall Street Lunch: Generative AI Powers October E-Commerce Spending
items.description: Adobe (ADBE) says U.S. online spending rose 8.2% year-over-year in October to $88.7 billion.
